headline: Most ethical companies in the world includes six Wisconsin firms
summary: Oshkosh Corp. joins five other Wisconsin-based companies on Ethisphere's 2026 "World's Most Ethical Companies" list.

headline: Major European Tissue Paper Maker Continues U.S. Expansion
summary: The company knew it was going to expand, it just didn't know where—until now.

headline: Puig stock soars 13% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
summary: Shares of Puig Brands closed 13.4% higher Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.

raw.headline: Puig stock soars 13% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
